title: Corelib test matrix green (42/42 just corelib)
body:
Close the full `just corelib` gate: **42/42** targets in [`corelib_tests.bproj`](compiler/corelib/beskid_corelib/tests/corelib_tests/corelib_tests.bproj) via parallel domain agents (console, collections, system, concurrency, core).

## Baseline (2026-06-08, pre-fix)

**5/42** targets pass on first `just corelib` slice; **2** target-level failures observed before run completed:

| Target | Layer | Symptom |
|--------|-------|--------|
| `SystemOutputWriteTests` | resolve | `unknown value System` — missing `use System.Output` |
| `ConsoleAnsiStyleChainTests` | codegen | `sgr_builder_fg_basic_golden` — missing expression type (`Ansi.Sgr`) |

**Green targets:** syscall trio, `SystemOutputWriteLineTests`, `ConsoleAnsiEscapeTests` (8/8 including Capabilities chain).

## Landed

- Import codemod, spine typecheck gates, struct-seed + `unit_path_key`, BSOL stability, pipeline unification, concurrency stack fixes
- Partial CLIF gates in [`corelib_tests_codegen.rs`](compiler/crates/beskid_tests/src/spine/corelib_tests_codegen.rs)
- `SystemOutputWriteTests` import fix (`use System.Output`)

## Remaining

- Console SGR builder scoped expr-type/codegen; collections/concurrency/system/core domains
- Full matrix re-run after compiler gates; target **42/42**

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Catalog tip:** [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf) (2026-06-07)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `compiler-corelib`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-corelib-complete`
